name: esp_wifi_service_get_status
description: Get Wi-Fi service state, station connection details, IP information, provisioning state, and profile count

name: esp_wifi_service_list_profiles
description: List saved Wi-Fi profiles without passwords

name: esp_wifi_service_add_profile
description: Add or update a saved Wi-Fi profile. The password is stored but never returned by MCP responses

password.description: Wi-Fi password; omit or use an empty string for open networks

priority.description: Profile priority from 0 to 20; higher is preferred

name: esp_wifi_service_set_profile_enabled
description: Enable or disable a saved Wi-Fi profile by SSID

ssid.description: SSID of the profile to update

enabled.description: true to enable the profile, false to disable it

name: esp_wifi_service_delete_profile
description: Delete a saved Wi-Fi profile by index or SSID

ssid.description: SSID of the profile to delete

name: esp_wifi_service_prov_start
description: Start all configured Wi-Fi provisioning agents

name: esp_wifi_service_request_reeval
description: Request one Wi-Fi selector scan and re-evaluation cycle
